reasoning: This workout specifically targets Koren's poor lactate clearance and underdeveloped aerobic base. Considering the extended rest and reduced intensity need, it's vital to employ a controlled build in intensity. Connecting to Koren's goal, improving the lactate threshold will be crucial for sustained effort on the Alpine Loop climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3 sets of 10 minutes alternating between 3 mins at 201-218W and 2 mins at 242-256W. Between sets, 5 mins at 209-223W.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
